notes: Traces both views from the photo but arms fuse into amorphous blobs, individual tentacles are lost, and the eye/sucker detail is missing — reads as a photo-trace silhouette, not an FAO plate.
specific_issues: arms not separated into distinct appendages
eye on top view missing entirely; bottom-view eye is a tiny indistinct mark
silhouette wobbles with photo-trace noise rather than clean continuous ink
stipple is scattered noise rather than concentrated chromatophore fields
fin shape on top view is distorted and merges into mantle without a clear outline
tentacular clubs are not articulated as in FAO references
linework is too thin/wispy and lacks single-weight ink confidence
